key.name: locale
key.description: The locale to use for translating month names, day names, and weekdays. Options: "fr" (French), "en" (English), or "system" (use system locale)

key.name: clock-decoration
key.description: The decoration text to display on both sides of the clock time. Use empty string to disable clock decoration.

key.name: decoration-before-clock
key.description: Whether to show the configured clock decoration before the clock time.

key.name: decoration-after-clock
key.description: Whether to show the configured clock decoration after the clock time.

key.name: include-day-name
key.summary: Include day name in the date menu
key.description: Whether to show the revolutionary day name in the menu date line.

key.name: include-day-name-link
key.summary: Make day name clickable when possible
key.description: Whether to render the revolutionary day name as a clickable link when link data is available.
